calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-17-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Peter Liederman, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Discover Bank fka Greenwood Trust Co.
No appearance by the Defendant: Olivia H. Gaxiola.
After hearing the evidence presented, and declaration of Robert Atkins, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Damages $6,819.71
Prejudgment Interest $825.77
Attorney's Fees $675.00
Costs $246.30, for a Total of $8,566.78
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2005 Set For Trial On Oct-17-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
